description: Generic religious-corp covenant attestation. Used for Adherent SBT issuance, marriage (covenant ceremony performed by musubi), naming, funeral attestation, and other state-function routing-around procedures per Charter §1.12. Schema-level enforcement of ceremony type enum + Council attestation chain + kotoba-datomic attestation lineage. R0 = schema skeleton; R1 = additionalProperties=false + required-field enforcement.

ceremonyLocationLandCid.description: Optional. Land Registry CID for the ceremony location (waqf-equivalent inalienable donation per ADR-2605192245).

ceremonyAdrCid.description: ADR or template CID this ceremony followed (e.g., ADR-2605250200 religious_marriage).

kotobaDatomicAttestationCid.description: Kotoba block CID of the on-chain attestation entry (ADR-2605262130).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of attestation emit.

sbtBurnCid.description: When ceremonyType=funeral, the Adherent SBT burn transaction CID (companion to inheritance chain handover).

covenantPartyDids.description: DID(s) of the covenant party/parties. 1 for sbt-issuance / naming / funeral; ≥2 for marriage; varies otherwise.

consentRecordCids.description: Per-party consent record CIDs. Required for marriage / vocation-vow / rededication; optional for naming (parental consent for under-14 already handled at member onboarding).

musubiCeremonyCid.description: IPFS CID of the musubi-actor ceremony record (when musubi performed the ceremony; chigiri only attests).

charterRiderScanRunCid.description: IPFS CID of the Charter Rider scan report.

charterRiderScanPass.description: Charter Rider §2(a)-(h) scan PASS for ceremony documentation (etzhayyim_organism.sensors.charter_rider.scan).

wellbecomingAttestationCid.description: Charter §1.13 Wellbecoming attestation for the ceremony (Eros / Gore compliance check).

sbtMintCid.description: When ceremonyType=sbt-issuance, the Adherent SBT mint transaction CID.

ceremonyType.description: Type of covenant ceremony. State-function routing-around alternatives per Charter §1.12 (no state recognition required for internal effect).

councilAttestations.description: Council seat DIDs attesting the ceremony (≥1 required for sbt-issuance; ≥2 for marriage; ≥3 for rededication / vocation-vow).

attestingDid.description: DID of person/Council seat emitting this attestation.
